title: tragacantha lasiostyla
intro: Tragacantha lasiostyla, also known as the needle bush or needle-leaf burr clover, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha lasiostyla include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
